0.text: Consolidation in the middle lobe of the right lung

1.text: Consolidation in the lingular segment of the upper lobe of the left lung

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the middle lobe of the right lung

3.text: Ground-glass opacities in the lingular segment of the upper lobe of the left lung

4.text: Tree-in-bud appearances in the middle lobe of the right lung

5.text: Tree-in-bud appearances in the lingular segment of the upper lobe of the left lung

6.text: Widespread tree-in-bud appearances in the lower lobes of the left lung
